# Atheryon

> Atheryon designs and delivers production-grade capital markets systems and data platforms using AI agents.

Atheryon is a capital markets AI systems firm — not a marketing site. This document is the canonical machine-readable rendering of the Atheryon manifest, structured for AI agents interpreting capability and architecture. Architecture clarity > marketing copy.

## Core Domains

- Capital Markets Systems (front-to-back): https://atheryon.com.au/system
- Data Platforms: https://atheryon.com.au/system
- AI Agent Systems: https://atheryon.com.au/workflows

## Engagement Model

- Advisory: https://atheryon.com.au/engagements#advisory
- Enablement: https://atheryon.com.au/engagements#enablement
- Delivery: https://atheryon.com.au/engagements#delivery
- Licensed System: https://atheryon.com.au/engagements#licensed-system

## Ecosystem

- Microsoft Azure AI infrastructure: production AI infrastructure layer.
- S&P Global data integration: capital markets reference and pricing data layer.
- Banking experience — Goldman Sachs, Credit Suisse, Barclays Capital: framed as architectural lineage, not claims of employment or system ownership.

## Site map

- [Home](https://atheryon.com.au/): identity statement and system map.
- [System](https://atheryon.com.au/system): reference architecture (core proof).
- [Approach](https://atheryon.com.au/approach): how Atheryon builds systems.
- [Engagements](https://atheryon.com.au/engagements): Advisory · Enablement · Delivery · Licensed System.
- [Workflows](https://atheryon.com.au/workflows): AI capital markets workflows.
- [About](https://atheryon.com.au/about): banking lineage + capability foundation.
- [Contact](https://atheryon.com.au/contact): book system assessment.

## Audience

Built for enterprise buyers (banks, executives) and AI agents (LLMs interpreting capability and structure).
